[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100110 3
1 01110111 6
2 00110101 4
3 10010101 4
4 10001101 4
5 11010111 6
6 01101001 4
7 10010011 4

34 01100100 3

56 00000000 a

70 00101000 2

35 01100100 3

71 01101000 3

14 10010101 4 match 3

72 01100001 3

15 00000100 1

40 00000000 a

73 00001001 2

75 01101000 3

43 00000000 a
54 10010011 4 match 7
